title: Remembering a Brave TV Star
summary: Mel Schilling was a star on a TV show called Married at First Sight in Australia and the UK. She helped people find love as a relationship coach. Sadly, she died after being sick with cancer for two years. Her friend Paul, who worked with her on the show, shared a nice message about her. He said Mel was fearless, tough, and very strong. Even when she was traveling and getting treatment, she always smiled and never complained. Mel cared a lot about women and the LGBTQ+ community. She also loved her family, like her daughter and husband. The TV channel said they will keep showing the show because Mel wanted to help others find happiness. Everyone will miss her very much.

background_read: Married at First Sight is a reality TV show where people agree to marry someone they have never met before. It is popular in countries like Australia and the UK. The show has coaches who help the couples with their relationships. Mel Schilling was one of these coaches, known for being brave and caring. She worked on the show for many years, even while she was sick with cancer. Her story teaches us about strength and kindness.
Article_Structure: WHO: Mel Schilling, a relationship coach on Married at First Sight TV show, and her friend Paul C Brunson.
WHAT: Paul shared a tribute about Mel after she died from cancer, praising her strength and fearlessness.
WHERE: The TV show is in Australia and the UK, and the tribute was posted online.
WHY: To remember Mel and show how she inspired others by living her values and helping people find love.

perspectives.description: Paul sees Mel as a fearless and strong person who never complained, even during hard times.
